message:
✨ Replace CSS scaling with fitAddon.fit() for tile mode (#148)

- Use fitAddon.fit() with real PTY resize instead of CSS transform:scale()
  so terminals reflow at readable font size with proper text wrapping
- Remove termNaturalSizes ref and useLayoutEffect size caching (no longer needed)
- Remove suppressPtyResize during tile fitting — remote app redraws correctly
- Fix wheel throttle: only preventDefault on throttled events, let xterm.js
  handle scroll naturally for the rest (fixes tile scroll)
- Clean tile exit: clear inline styles and refit active terminal to viewport

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
